title: elaphrium pilosum
intro: Elaphrium pilosum, also known as the hairy goat's beard or goat's beard, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Elaphrium pilosum include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues and fluid retention. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Elaphrium pilosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
